paper_title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces BERT, a bidirectional Transformer encoder pre-trained using Masked Language Modeling (MLM) and Next Sentence Prediction (NSP), enabling better contextual understanding compared to unidirectional models
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, question answering, sentiment analysis, named entity recognition, and general-purpose NLP tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Bidirectional language representation learning for NLP tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM), Next Sentence Prediction (NSP)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised discriminative fine-tuning with task-specific classification heads
raw_extraction.paper_title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces BERT, a bidirectional Transformer encoder pre-trained using Masked Language Modeling (MLM) and Next Sentence Prediction (NSP), enabling better contextual understanding compared to unidirectional models. The larger model improves performance further on downstream tasks
